description: Novel Prep Middle Level Math Placement — full 100-item online diagnostic from Placement_Middle_Level.tex (5 bands × 20 constructed-response items).

brand.trust_line: Responses are saved for teacher review. Band scoring follows the printed guide: 16/20 in a band supports advancing to the next readiness level.
brand.trust_line_zh: 作答已保存供教师批阅。各档位评分与纸质《初中段数学分班测试》一致：每档 20 题中答对 16 题及以上可进入下一档评估。

score_band_rubric.title: Math 5 foundations
score_band_rubric.headline: Focus on Math 5 foundations across the early bands.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 建议重点巩固 Math 5 基础（前几档表现）。
score_band_rubric.summary: Use Parts I–II teacher scoring. Fewer than 16/20 on Questions 1–20 suggests remediation before advancing.
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: 请教师按纸质答案批改 Part I–II；1–20 题不足 16 题正确时建议先补强再晋级。
highlights: Review whole-number operations, place value, and measurement.
Use the printable answer key for each 20-question band.

score_band_rubric.title: Math 6–7 track
score_band_rubric.headline: Middle-school core readiness — Math 6–7 range likely.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 初中核心准备度 — 可能在 Math 6–7 区间。
score_band_rubric.summary: Student completed the full diagnostic. Teacher scoring on Parts I–III determines whether Math 7+ placement is appropriate.
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: 学生已完成全套诊断；教师批改 Part I–III 后判断是否适合 Math 7 及以上。
highlights: Score each 20-question band separately on the printable key.
16/20 threshold per band before advancing interpretation.
Consider pacing and shown work, not just final answers.

score_band_rubric.title: Math 8 / pre-algebra track
score_band_rubric.headline: Strong middle-school performance — Math 8 / pre-algebra signals.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 初中段表现较好 — 出现 Math 8 / 预代数信号。
score_band_rubric.summary: If Parts I–IV each score ≥16/20 on teacher review, student may be ready for Algebra 1/2 readiness material.
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: 若教师批改 Part I–IV 均达 16/20，可评估 Algebra 1/2 准备度。
highlights: Review Part IV–V responses for algebra readiness.
Coordinate with school for Integrated or Algebra 1 placement.
Use upper-school or Enhanced Math 1 diagnostics if scores support it.

score_band_rubric.title: Algebra readiness
score_band_rubric.headline: Full diagnostic submitted — algebra readiness under teacher review.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 全套 100 题已提交 — 代数准备度待教师批改确认。
score_band_rubric.summary: All 100 constructed responses captured. If Parts IV–V each score ≥16/20, consider Algebra 1 or a higher diagnostic.
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: 100 道解答题作答已保存；若 Part IV–V 各达 16/20，可考虑 Algebra 1 或更高级诊断。
highlights: Use the five-band score card on the printable test.
Discuss honors / Integrated pathways with the school.
Optional follow-up: Enhanced Math 1 or upper-school placement.
